Settings General - Switch back language to EN-US
Chat User A - Reply to yourself
Send Files on Chats - Message Sent With Attachment - Attachment Contents
Click in the Home button should take you to Home folder
Settings Audio - Assert screen texts for Media-Message Sounds and Call Timer
Edit Group - Attempt to change Group Name for a name with more than 64 characters
Settings Profile - Username with non-alphanumeric characters
User can scroll to bottom of chat conversation
Chat Input Text - Validate messages with links were received correctly
Context Menu - Folder - Delete
Add Friend Input - Attempt to send friend request to a user with outgoing pending request
Files - File is renamed when uploading a file with existing file name
Validate Sidebar is displayed in screen
Enter Pin Screen - Clear cache, reset app and enter a valid pin
Send files from Browse Files - Send files button shows 0/8 files if no files are selected
Validate Pre Release Indicator is displayed and has correct text
Sidebar - Search string matching username and group and go to first result
Validate Main Nav Bar buttons tooltips are displayed
